Elephant Charge 2009

24 October 2009 · 📍 Muchinda

11 Entries
3 Completed
27% Finish rate
$8,729 Raised
9 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Burn — For refusing to give up and managing to use the rim of their front wheel with the tyre removed as an improvised winch.
